title: Women of Niskavuori
writer: Jaakko Huttunen, Orvo Saarikivi, Hella Wuolijoki
actors: Olga Tainio, Tauno Palo, Irja Elstelä
plot: The first Finnish talking picture (with English subtitles) to be released in the United States is a story of the conflict between the old and new orders of living. Tauno Palo marries Irja Lautia because his mother, Olga Tainio, te...
